underlying_goal: Fix failing rule engine tests related to NEAR+NOT proximity semantics, ensuring Gen3 engine produces correct per-occurrence match results across all test interfaces, then commit the fixes
friction_detail: Initial global-suppress semantics were incorrect (should be per-occurrence), and test data files on disk weren't regenerated by the gen script, requiring a separate fix in add_bug_test_cases.py.
brief_summary: User wanted NEAR+NOT rule engine test failures fixed via correct per-occurrence semantics and committed; Claude diagnosed the semantics, fixed code/test data across multiple files, achieved all tests passing, and pushed.
